extension.summary: Syncher - Scene Release Downloader and Streamer with Debrid, Trakt, RapidRAR
extension.description: Syncher v2.0.0 by zeus768 - Browse Movies, TV Shows, Sports Highlights and Music. Scrapes scene release sites (RapidRAR, PSA, RapidMoviez, TFPDL, WatchSeriesHD, RLSbb, DDLValley, SceneSource) plus sports replay sites. Resolves links through Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox and RapidRAR premium. Trakt integration for browsing, watchlists, scrobbling. TMDB metadata with posters, cast, directors. NOTE: A Debrid service (Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox) OR RapidRAR premium account is required for best results.
extension.disclaimer: This addon does not host any content. A debrid service or RapidRAR.cr premium account is recommended.
extension.news: v2.0.0 (2026) - Initial release by zeus768 - Trakt API powered browsing (Movies, TV Shows, Sports, Music) - TMDB metadata enrichment (posters, cast, directors, fanart) - Scene scrapers: RapidRAR, PSA, RapidMoviez, TFPDL, WatchSeriesHD, RLSbb, DDLValley, SceneSource - Sports replay scrapers: Sport-Video, FullMatchShows, FootballOrgin, Basketball-Video - Debrid resolvers: Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox (device code auth) - RapidRAR.cr premium resolver with login - Trakt authorization with device code - Warez site login support (per-site credentials) - Favourites, Search, Trakt Lists
